summary: P0 and P1 bug fixes verified successfully for Audix Stock Management. Scanned/submitted data now correctly appears in Locations and Reports pages. Delete location functionality properly removes data from Reports.
seed_data_creation: Created test locations (BUG-TEST-X1, DEL-TST-X3) during testing - cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 and P1 bugs verified fixed. App is in Dynamic mode. All data is client-side (localStorage/IndexedDB). batchSaveScannedItems function in AppContext.js handles atomic batch saving. deleteLocation properly cleans up scanned items.

details.test_flow: Create location -> Scan items -> Submit -> Verify in Locations -> Verify in Reports
details.result: Data appears correctly in both Locations page (with qty 1) and Reports page (with Submitted badge)
details.console_logs: Batch saved 1 items to location, Cleared temp items

details.test_flow: Create location -> Submit -> Delete from Locations -> Verify removed from Reports
details.result: After delete, location no longer appears in Reports page

details.locations_page: Shows 2 Dynamic mode locations with correct quantities
details.reports_page: Shows all 4 locations with correct item counts and quantities
details.dashboard: Shows correct totals - 4 Locations, 162 Items, 2 Completed

details.scan_items_flow: Location selection -> Barcode scanning -> Auto-save to localStorage -> Submit saves to context
details.delete_cleanup: deleteLocation removes both location and scanned items from state

mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IS CLIENT-SIDE using localStorage and IndexedDB - no backend API calls
